disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Insidious three-month history of profound fatigue, unintentional weight loss and drenching night sweats
trigger_question_examples: How long have you been feeling unwell?
Have you had any weight loss, fevers or night sweats?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about three months I've been really run-down and tired, I've lost weight without trying, and this past week I've been soaking the sheets with sweat at night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A month of left-upper-quadrant dragging fullness and early satiety
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the heavy feeling in your side?
Have you noticed getting full quickly when you eat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For the last month my upper left belly has felt heavy and dragging, like something's sitting there, and I fill up after only a few bites of food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe sharp left-upper-quadrant pain radiating to the left shoulder, three hours ago, worse on movement
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and does it go anywhere?
What were you doing when the sharp pain started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About three hours ago it suddenly turned into a sharp twisting pain high on my left side under the ribs, and it shoots up to my left shoulder. Standing or moving makes it much worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous prolonged epistaxis (about twenty minutes) with no trauma, controlled only by direct pressure
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the nosebleed — how long did it last?
Did anything set the nosebleed off?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The nosebleed just started on its own, no bump or anything, and it went on for about twenty minutes until I pinched my nose hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New easy bruising over the lower limbs without recalled trauma
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any new bruises?
Do you bruise more easily than usual lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've got a few bruises coming up on my lower legs and I don't remember banging them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not on any anticoagulant or NSAID and takes no regular medicines
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any blood thinners or anti-inflammatory tablets?
Do you take any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any regular tablets, no blood thinners and no anti-inflammatories.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with a high risk of collapse if unwell at home
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you tonight?
Who could help you if things got worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, there's nobody here with me tonight, and I'm scared of collapsing with no one around.
